SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Jun-09-2011 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: 9:09am
Judge Pro Tem Marc Seidenfeld, clerk - Leslie Gomez, nothing on record, dept. 414.
Cause called for Smalll Claims Appeal. Appellants, Xiao Qing Chen & Walter Chen appear in pro per. Respondent, Michael Hall appears in pro per. Parties, previously sworn, testify in the narrative and respond to questions from Judge Seidenfeld.
